kpi_assessment.why_flawed: Mask IoU is harder than box IoU by design. Seg model graded on per-pixel accuracy, det model on rectangle overlap. Comparison is not apples-to-apples.
kpi_assessment.actual_contribution_2: Seg provides mask mAP50-95 = 0.5533. Det provides zero masks.
kpi_assessment.actual_contribution_3: Novel 6,467-image Indian mixed-waste dataset does not exist elsewhere.
kpi_assessment.paper_framing: Lead with dataset novelty and mask capability. +2.8pp box improvement is supporting evidence.

paper_text: YOLOv11s-seg achieves a box mAP50-95 of 0.650 on the proposed dataset, outperforming the YOLOv8n detection baseline (0.622) while simultaneously providing pixel-level instance masks (mask mAP50-95 = 0.553) — a capability bounding-box detectors fundamentally cannot offer.
kpi_actual_result: Seg provides pixel masks det cannot. Box delta +2.8pp.
